basic_details.job_title: DYSL-QT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: DRDO Young Scientist Laboratory- Quantum Technologies (DYSL-QT)
basic_details.short_information: DRDO Young Scientist Laboratory- Quantum Technologies (DYSL-QT) has officially announced the JRF (Electronics) Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 2025–26 at the official DRDO website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 28 years and hold a B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech in ECE/ETE/EIE/Electronics/EEE/EE with VLSI/Embedded/DSP specialisation along with NET/GATE qualification can now submit their applications via offline mode from 2026 to 15 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation for SC, ST and OBC (NCL) category as per Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in ECE/ETE/EIE/Electronics/EEE/EE with VLSI/Embedded/DSP electives in 1st Division + NET/GATE, M.E/M.Tech in ECE/ETE/EIE/Electronics/EEE/EE with VLSI/Embedded/DSP specialisation in 1st Division at both levels
qualification.details: JRF (Electronics): B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech Degree in Electronics & Communication Engg (ECE)/Electronics & Telecommunication Engg (ETE)/Electronics & Instrumentation Engg (EIE)/Electronics Engineering/Electrical & Electronics Engg (EEE)/Electrical Engineering (EE) with electives covering VLSI Design, Embedded Systems, Digital Signal Processing in 1st Division with valid NET/GATE qualification. Specialisation in VLSI Design, Embedded Systems, Digital Signal Processing in 1st Division both at Graduate and Postgraduate level for M.E/M.Tech.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DYSL-QT JRF (Electronics) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.drdo_young_scientist_laboratory_quantum_: B.E/B.Tech in ECE/ETE/EIE/Electronics/EEE/EE with VLSI/Embedded/DSP electives in 1st Division + NET/GATE, M.E/M.Tech in ECE/ETE/EIE/Electronics/EEE/EE with VLSI/Embedded/DSP specialisation in 1st Division at both levels

content_sections.heading: DRDO DYSL-QT JRF (Electronics) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DYSL-QT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DYSL-QT JRF (Electronics) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DRDO DYSL-QT JRF (Electronics) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: JRF (Electronics): B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech Degree in Electronics & Communication Engg (ECE)/Electronics & Telecommunication Engg (ETE)/Electronics & Instrumentation Engg (EIE)/Electronics Engineering/Electrical & Electronics Engg (EEE)/Electrical Engineering (EE) with electives covering VLSI Design, Embedded Systems, Digital Signal Processing in 1st Division with valid NET/GATE qualification. Specialisation in VLSI Design, Embedded Systems, Digital Signal Processing in 1st Division both at Graduate and Postgraduate level for M.E/M.Tech.

content_sections.heading: DRDO DYSL-QT JRF (Electronics) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation for SC, ST and OBC (NCL) category as per Government rules.

content_sections.heading: DRDO DYSL-QT JRF (Electronics) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.drdo.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DRDO DYSL-QT JRF (Electronics) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO JRF (Electronics) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DRDO JRF (Electronics) recruitment is 15th July 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF (Electronics) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech degree in relevant Electronics engineering disciplines with specific electives and a valid NET/GATE qualification. For M.E/M.Tech, a first-division at both graduate and postgraduate levels is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF (Electronics) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF (Electronics) post is 28 years. Age relaxations will be provided to candidates belonging to SC, ST, and OBC (NCL) categories as per the prevailing government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF (Electronics) role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the JRF (Electronics) position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per government norms. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the JRF (Electronics) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in Electronics position under the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) for this recruitment cycle.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this DRDO JRF (Electronics) recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DRDO JRF (Electronics) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DRDO JRF (Electronics) recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF (Electronics) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF (Electronics) post primarily involves an interview. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted and called for an interview to assess their suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), a premier agency under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, dedicated to research and development in defence technologies.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of DRDO, which is www.drdo.gov.in. The direct link to the notification PDF is also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
